common.featureDisabled: This feature is not enabled on the connected backend.

connection.apiBaseHint: Origin only — the client appends /v1 itself. Leave blank to use the current origin.
connection.tokenHint: Stored per-backend; switching the API base swaps to that backend's token.

gate.cannotConnectHint: Check the API base in the connection panel (top right) and make sure the databench service is running.
gate.clientTooOld: This backend requires frontend client {{min}} or newer, but this client is {{current}}. Please update the console.
gate.apiUnsupported: This console does not support the backend API version "{{api}}". Please update the console or point it at a compatible backend.
gate.incompatibleHint: You can point the console at a different backend from the connection panel (top right).

datasets.title: Datasets / Refs
datasets.description: Named refs from /v1/refs. Each ref points to the latest dataset version. Open a ref or a version to inspect its manifest and samples.
datasets.emptyNoRefs: No refs yet. Ingest a dataset to get started.

detail.exportHint: streams the full dataset as NDJSON from /v1/datasets/{ref}/export
detail.pageSizeHint: Samples load lazily as you scroll (server cap {{max}}/page).
detail.emptyRange: This dataset has no samples in this range.

ingest.jsonlDisabled: JSONL ingest is not enabled on the connected backend.
ingest.createDescription: Paste a JSON array of samples; posts to /v1/datasets.
ingest.errExpectArray: Expected a JSON array of samples.

transforms.title: Transforms
transforms.selectPrompt: Select a transform to run it.
transforms.inputsLabel: Inputs (refs/versions, one per line or comma-separated)
transforms.errNeedInput: Provide at least one input ref/version.
transforms.errParamsObject: Params must be a JSON object.

recipe.title: Materialize recipe
recipe.description: Paste a recipe object; posts to /v1/recipes:materialize and returns the resulting dataset manifest.
recipe.errRecipeObject: Recipe must be a JSON object.

lineage.title: Lineage / Provenance
lineage.disabled: Lineage is not enabled on the connected backend.
lineage.placeholder: ref or version, e.g. my-dataset or sha256:…
lineage.emptyPrompt: Enter a ref/version to inspect its provenance DAG.

errors.unreachable: Cannot reach the backend. Is the databench service running?
